images.title: Data Physicalization Project  ·  University of Twente, 2022
images.caption: The data physicalization museum installation — 3D printed planets, physical dials, actuators, and a blow dryer outputting hot or cold air based on planetary surface temperature data. [Project Page](/physical-data)

images.title: M12 Digital Twins in Education  ·  TU/e Master, 2025
images.caption: The browser-based Arduino learning environment used in the M12 study — four feedback role variants tested across N=41 participants. [Project Page](/digital-twin-in-education)
